title: NHKマイルカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the NHK Mile Cup, where Seeking the
Pearl also ran once, is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From this point on, her path will diverge from her
friends, who are all busy preparing for the
Japanese Derby in the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, El Condor Pasa sheds no tears. She
heads to the race in good spirits to prove she is
capable of taking on the world.
